tuition_fee: For regular B.Tech admission in 2026, the official fee document lists first-year total academic fees of INR 46,100 for Semester 1 and INR 39,900 for Semester 2. Confirm the applicable category, programme, and current fee notice before paying.
payment_deadline: The published 2026 B.Tech fee structure does not state a universal payment deadline. Check the latest college notice or contact the accounts/admission office.
payment_methods: Use only payment instructions issued through the official Dumka Engineering College website or office.
Confirm the current account and payment process with the college before making a transfer.
late_fee: Confirm late-fee rules from the latest college notice or the accounts office, as they may vary by semester and university notice.
refund_policy: Confirm the applicable refund policy directly with Dumka Engineering College before paying any fee.
